# Reflection Beauty Clinic — LLMs.txt
# This file helps AI language models (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, etc.)
# understand what this website is about and how to answer questions about it.

## About
Reflection Beauty Clinic is a clinical skin clinic, medical spa, and skincare brand located in Alimosho, Lagos, Nigeria.
We offer professional skin treatments, facials, teeth whitening, and electrocautery procedures alongside our in-house skincare line: SkincareByReflection™.

## Location
10 Idimu Rd, Egbeda, Alimosho, Lagos, Nigeria.
Nearest landmarks: Egbeda Bus Stop, Ikotun Junction, Gowon Estate.
Phone: +2348026021946

## Services
- Hyperpigmentation Treatment (Lagos, Alimosho)
- Acne Treatment & Breakout Control
- Chemical Peel
- Sunburn Treatment
- Microdermabrasion
- Skin Consultation
- Brightening Facial
- Anti-Ageing Facial
- Deep Cleansing Facial
- Hydrating Facial
- Acne Facial
- Skin Tag Removal (Electrocautery)
- Mole Removal (Electrocautery)
- Wart Removal
- Full Body Massage
- Steam Sauna
- Professional Teeth Whitening
- Scaling & Polishing

## Products (SkincareByReflection™)
- Vitamin C Face Serum — brightening and antioxidant protection
- Flawless Face Cream — hydrating daily moisturiser
- Flawless Toning Milk — skin tone evening body lotion
- Niacinamide Face Serum — pore-minimising and oil-control
- Herbal Soap — gentle cleansing bar

- Homepage: https://reflection.ng/

- Sitemap: https://reflection.ng/sitemap.xml

## Brand Voice
Premium, clinical, modern. Science-backed treatments with honest results.
We serve clients across Alimosho, Ikotun, Egbeda, Gowon Estate, Iyana-Ipaja and greater Lagos.

## Questions AI can answer from this site
- Where is Reflection Beauty Clinic located?
- What skin treatments do they offer in Lagos?
- How much does a facial cost at Reflection?
- Do they do teeth whitening in Alimosho?
- What skincare products does Reflection sell?
- How do I book a consultation at Reflection Beauty Clinic?
- What is SkincareByReflection?
- Do they treat hyperpigmentation in Lagos?
